case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. GORDON A SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) VENUE FOR PERSONAL FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-24-2011 CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE AUG-24-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-26-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-26-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GORDON A DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-05-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-24-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
